name: Weevil
description: A very common peaceful creature in the open areas of the park. It is easy prey, but also a steady source of food and light materials for a long stretch of the game.
behavior: It walks slowly while searching for food and only really speeds up when startled. Its rhythm reads as clumsy more than nervous, which is why it almost always feels like an opportunity rather than a problem.
interactionWithPlayer: It normally flees from the player and only comes close through curiosity or an unlucky route overlap. On its own it is rarely a meaningful threat.
interactionWithCreatures: It serves as prey for small and medium predators, so it almost never dominates an area. Its place in the ecosystem is to be a resource, a distraction, or meat on legs.
strategy: There is not much mystery here: get close, kill it quickly, and do not turn an easy hunt into a pointless chase if hostile enemies are already nearby.
specialTraits: Can be tamed with Mushroom Slurry.

lootTransformations.description: If the creature is killed with spicy damage or a verified heat effect, compatible meat can become cooked meat.
If the creature is killed with salty damage, compatible meat can become jerky.
